  "findings": [
    "Crushed flexible duct restricting airflow",
    "Excessively long flexible duct run with unnecessary slack"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cut flexible duct to the minimum length required for the run without slack",
    "Reroute and support the duct to eliminate kinks, sharp bends, and crushed sections"
  ],
  "rationale": "Flexible ducts must be fully extended and installed without excess length, kinks, or compressions. Crushed or excessively long runs significantly increase static pressure, restrict airflow, and violate manufacturer installation instructions and code standards.",
  "references": [
    "IMC Section 603",
    "SMACNA Fibrous Glass Duct Construction Standards",
    "ACCA Manual D"
  ]
}
